response:
CLOCK CLOCK CLOCK
THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME IS W MULTIPLIED BY 0.98 TO THE POWER OF N.
TO ACHIEVE A 25 PERCENT REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE WE SOLVE THE EQUATION 1 MINUS 0.98 TO THE POWER OF N EQUALS 0.25.
THIS MEANS 0.98 TO THE POWER OF N MUST EQUAL 0.75.
USING LOGARITHMS WE FIND THAT N IS APPROXIMATELY 13.86.
SINCE ALEX CANNOT ADD A FRACTION OF A COMPONENT WE ROUND UP TO THE NEAREST WHOLE NUMBER.
THEREFORE ALEX MUST ADD AT LEAST 14 ADVANCED COMPONENTS TO MEET THE GOAL.
THE CLOCK TICKS AWAY AS ALEX PREPARES FOR THE LONG DISTANCE EVENT.
EVERY MINUTE COUNTS LIKE A CLOCK WHEN OPTIMIZING PERFORMANCE FOR THE RACE.
THE CLOCK SHOWS THAT 14 IS THE MINIMUM REQUIRED TO REACH THE TARGET EFFICIENCY.
